caption: The video features a split-screen interview between a woman and a man. The woman has reddish hair and wears a blue denim shirt and red earrings, while the man wears glasses, has a white goatee, and wears a blue shirt. The man's background includes a blue wall with an "OPEN" sign and a framed picture. On-screen graphics in blue and white banners display the text "FOCUS with Margaret Harrington" on the left and "No More Time Climate Crisis Poems by Greg Delanty" on the right, accompanied by a "TOWN MEETING TV" logo. Across the sequence, the woman speaks and shifts her expression, while the man looks toward the camera and speaks. In one instance, a blurred hand moves quickly across the woman's video feed. The scene remains static in terms of location and composition as the two individuals engage in their conversation.
